name: microrealestate
description: This is an Open Source Real estate management system that helps landlords to manage their rentals and properties
readme_summary: MicroRealEstate is an open-source JavaScript application designed to help landlords manage their rental properties. It provides a centralized platform for storing property and tenant information, creating leases, tracking rent payments, generating custom documents, and facilitating collaboration among users.
primary_use_case: Property and rental management for landlords.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, organized landlord character is depicted as a conductor leading an orchestra. Instead of musical instruments, the orchestra members are holding various property management elements: one holds a ledger for rent payments, another a scroll representing leases, a third a blueprint for properties, and a fourth a megaphone for tenant notices. The conductor uses a glowing baton that emits digital particles, harmonizing all these elements into a smooth, efficient operation. In the background, subtle UI elements of the MicroRealEstate application are visible on floating screens. The scene is bright and clean, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a focus on clarity and organization, symbolizing streamlined property management.

name: dangerzone
description: Take potentially dangerous PDFs, office documents, or images and convert them to safe PDFs
readme_summary: Dangerzone is a security tool that converts potentially dangerous documents (PDFs, Office files, images) into safe, pixel-based PDFs. It achieves this by processing the documents within an isolated sandbox environment, stripping away any executable content and rendering them as raw image data before reconstructing them into a new, secure PDF.
key_features: Conversion of PDFs, Office documents, and images
Default opening in Dangerzone for safety
primary_use_case: To securely convert untrusted documents into a safe PDF format, mitigating risks from malicious content.
cover_image_prompt: A medieval alchemist in a secure, glass laboratory, carefully placing a suspicious-looking, ornate scroll (representing an untrusted document) into a bubbling, transparent cauldron. The cauldron is surrounded by a protective force field, symbolizing the sandbox. Inside the cauldron, the scroll dissolves into pure, glowing light particles. From the other side of the cauldron, a pristine, simple scroll emerges, emitting a soft, safe glow. Subtle digital data streams flow around the lab, and the 'Dangerzone' logo is etched onto a nearby workbench. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic, emphasizing the transformation from danger to safety.

name: ease-master
description: Design motion that feels real. The ultimate easing visualization and generation tool for modern frontend development.
readme_summary: EaseMaster is a TypeScript-based tool for modern frontend development that visualizes and generates easing functions for animations. It allows designers and developers to create and export custom Cubic Bezier curves and Spring physics animations into production-ready code for CSS, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and GSAP.
key_features: Dual Modes: Cubic Bezier Editor and Spring Physics Engine
Multi-Framework Export: CSS, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, GSAP
Theming with Shadcn UI compatibility and Dark/Light mode
primary_use_case: Visualizing, designing, and generating animation easing functions for frontend development across multiple frameworks.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan, representing EaseMaster, stands at a workbench. On one side, they are meticulously sculpting a smooth, flowing curve from a block of raw digital clay (representing Cubic Bezier). On the other side, they are carefully tuning a complex, spring-loaded mechanism that emits organic, bouncy energy (representing Spring Physics). Both processes feed into a magical conduit that instantly generates clean, ready-to-use code snippets for CSS, Framer Motion, and GSAP, which are then handed off to eager developers. The scene is set in a bright, modern studio with subtle UI elements and glowing lines of code integrated into the background. Style: 3D isometric illustration with a clean, vibrant color palette.

name: winshot
description: WinShot - A Windows screenshot tool with annotation, crop, and export features built with Wails (Go + React/TypeScript)
readme_summary: WinShot is a lightweight and performant screenshot tool for Windows, built with Wails (Go + React). It offers a modern glassmorphism UI and a wide range of features for capturing, annotating, and exporting screenshots efficiently.
key_features: Multiple capture modes (Fullscreen, Region, Window, Hotkey)
Rich annotation tools (Shapes, Arrows, Text, Numbers, Spotlight)
Multiple export formats (PNG, JPEG) and output ratios
System tray integration and global hotkeys
Smaller footprint and native performance compared to Electron apps
primary_use_case: Capturing, annotating, and exporting screenshots on Windows with a user-friendly interface and advanced editing tools.
cover_image_prompt: A digital artist's workbench, bathed in soft, ambient light. In the center, a magical quill pen hovers over a blank canvas, actively drawing a detailed screenshot of a bustling city skyline. The quill is leaving behind vibrant annotations like glowing arrows, text bubbles, and numbered markers, transforming the raw capture into a polished visual story. Subtle UI elements resembling a clean, modern interface are visible on a nearby floating screen, displaying capture options and export settings. The overall scene uses a glassmorphism aesthetic with translucent panels and soft gradients, conveying both creativity and technical precision. The repository name 'WinShot' is subtly etched into the wooden workbench. 3D isometric illustration style, highly detailed, vibrant yet soft color palette.

name: PCLink
description: Cross-platform desktop app for secure remote PC control and management, featuring a lightweight built-in WebUI and API for local or remote access.
readme_summary: PCLink is a cross-platform desktop application that provides secure remote PC control and management. It features a lightweight built-in WebUI and API, enabling local or remote access to your computer's functionalities.
primary_use_case: Secure remote PC control and management via a web interface and API.
cover_image_prompt: A stylized, glowing digital key seamlessly unlocking and opening a detailed, realistic computer monitor, revealing a vibrant, organized control panel inside. The key has 'PCLink' subtly etched onto its surface. Floating around the monitor are abstract representations of data streams and control signals, indicating remote access and management. The background is a clean, dark gradient, focusing all attention on the key and monitor. The overall mood is secure, efficient, and modern. Rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a focus on clean lines and a sophisticated color palette of blues, silvers, and subtle glows.
